assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can receive email when the selected route requires it.
No platform account, tenant, credentials, or product resources exist yet.
Developer has access to a server with SSH
Developer has basic knowledge of servers and SSH

developer_goal: Deploy an application or service on a self-hosted server using Coolify

first_success.outcome: First application or service is deployed and accessible through Coolify with automatic SSL and domain configuration optionally set
first_success.observable_signal: Application status shows as deployed and accessible in Coolify dashboard; optionally domain resolves with SSL

route_selection.rule: Reconstruct complete official candidate routes, prefer no payment/admin/approval when possible, then minimize required actions; leave consequential ties unresolved.

candidates.name: CLI
candidates.reason: While SSH and CLI are used for initial server setup and activation, the main developer interaction surface for deployment and management is the web UI.

candidates.name: API
candidates.reason: API exists for automation but is secondary to the web UI for first-mile onboarding and deployment.

prerequisites.description: Have an account on your server or hosting provider with SSH access
Access to a server or VPS with minimum 2 CPU cores and 2GB RAM recommended
Docker installed or use Coolify 1-Click App which includes Docker
Basic understanding of SSH, Git repositories or Docker images for deployment

external_gates.description: Need to have SSH access to a server or VPS to install Coolify
Server must meet minimum hardware requirements (2 CPU cores, 2GB RAM recommended)
SSH key must be added to server for secure access
Create admin account with strong password for first login
DNS A record must be configured for custom domain to enable HTTPS

platform_outcomes.description: Successfully deploy first application or service and access it via Coolify web interface
